title: Medical Repatriation. In case of medical repatriation, all costs related to
content: 4 repatriation, including transport through medical evacuation, with medical or non-medical 5 escorts, until transport to repatriation destination at the option of the seafarer’s family or 6 next of kin, shall be shouldered by the shipowner or LMA concerned. 7 8 In case of repatriation due to death, including suicide, all costs attendant to repatriation, 9 including transport of remains and personal belongings, upon arrival to point of 10 repatriation destination at the option of the seafarer’s family or next of kin, shall likewise 11 be borne by the shipowner/LMA. 12 13
